title: Create a patient session from registration
description: This test verifies a patient can complete registration with valid details and the app transitions into an active session state ready for use.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Patient A into the name field
Fill a valid age into the age field
Fill Stroke into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Verify an active patient session is created and the main patient app view is displayed

title: Persist and restore patient session after reload
description: This test verifies that after registering, reloading the app restores the same patient session without requiring re-registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Patient Restore into the name field
Fill a valid age into the age field
Fill ALS into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Reload the page
Verify the app restores the existing patient session rather than returning to registration

title: Play synthesized speech for a selected phrase
description: This test verifies that selecting a phrase results in audible playback starting after speech is generated successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page
Complete patient registration with a valid name, age, and condition
Select a phrase for speech output
Verify an audio playback experience starts for the selected phrase

title: Complete calibration and start gaze-based selection events
description: This test verifies gaze tracking can be initialized, calibrated successfully, and begins producing quadrant selection events that drive the communication UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Patient Gaze into the name field
Fill a valid age into the age field
Fill Locked-in syndrome into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Allow camera access when prompted by the browser
Start gaze calibration
Wait for calibration to complete
Verify gaze tracking is active and quadrant-based selection events are being reflected in the communication UI

title: Trigger phrase-to-speech and start audio playback
description: This test verifies selecting a communication phrase results in TTS playback starting in the browser.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Patient TTS into the name field
Fill a valid age into the age field
Fill ALS into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Select a communication phrase using the available selection mechanism
Verify audio playback starts for the selected phrase

title: Play multiple phrases sequentially without losing order
description: This test verifies that selecting multiple phrases in sequence results in multiple playbacks occurring reliably without skipping or freezing the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page
Complete patient registration with a valid name, age, and condition
Select a first phrase for speech output
Select a second phrase for speech output
Verify the app initiates playback for the selected phrases sequentially

title: Play audio reliably for multiple sequential phrase selections
description: This test verifies that selecting multiple phrases in sequence results in multiple audio playbacks without the UI getting stuck.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Patient Multi TTS into the name field
Fill a valid age into the age field
Fill Brainstem stroke into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Select a communication phrase using the available selection mechanism
Select a different communication phrase using the available selection mechanism
Verify the app plays audio for each selection without becoming unresponsive

title: Enable fallback mode when calibration fails
description: This test verifies that when calibration fails with low confidence, the app enables fallback mode and remains usable without crashing.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Patient Fallback into the name field
Fill a valid age into the age field
Fill Cervical injury into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Allow camera access when prompted by the browser
Start gaze calibration
Trigger a calibration failure using the app’s available calibration quality controls or retry flow until failure is indicated
Verify fallback mode is enabled and the app provides guidance to retry calibration without a hard failure

title: Retry queued speech and play audio when TTS becomes available
description: This test verifies that queued phrases can be retried later and playback starts once speech generation succeeds.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page
Complete patient registration with a valid name, age, and condition
Enter an invalid or expired TTS API key in the app settings if available
Select a phrase for speech output
Update the TTS API key to a valid key in the app settings if available
Trigger a retry of queued voice items if the UI provides a retry control
Verify a queued phrase begins audio playback

title: Queue phrase for retry when TTS authorization fails
description: This test verifies that when speech generation is unauthorized, the phrase is queued for retry and the user is not blocked from continuing.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page
Complete patient registration with a valid name, age, and condition
Enter an invalid or expired TTS API key in the app settings if available
Select a phrase for speech output
Verify the phrase is added to a queued state for later retry

title: Do not mis-trigger phrases when no reliable gaze selection is available
description: This test verifies that when fallback mode yields no reliable selection, the app does not trigger phrase selection or speech unexpectedly and remains stable.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Patient No Selection into the name field
Fill a valid age into the age field
Fill Neuromuscular disease into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Allow camera access when prompted by the browser
Enable fallback mode from the gaze tracking controls
Wait for gaze selection polling to run
Verify the communication UI shows that no reliable selection is available and no phrase is triggered

title: Continue using the app when camera permission is denied
description: This test verifies that denying camera permission does not crash the app and the user receives an actionable state to proceed without gaze tracking.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Patient No Camera into the name field
Fill a valid age into the age field
Fill Post-op recovery into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Deny camera access when prompted by the browser
Verify the app remains usable and shows an actionable message about enabling camera access for gaze tracking

title: Continue selecting additional phrases after an initial TTS queue event
description: This test verifies that after one phrase is queued due to a TTS failure, the user can select additional phrases without the UI getting stuck.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page
Complete patient registration with a valid name, age, and condition
Enter an invalid or expired TTS API key in the app settings if available
Select a first phrase for speech output
Select a second phrase for speech output
Verify the UI remains usable and both phrases appear in a queued state for later retry

title: Start a new registration after an existing session
description: This test verifies a caregiver can start a new patient registration after completing one session and the app switches to the new patient session.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Patient One into the name field
Fill a valid age into the age field
Fill TBI into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Click the control to start registering a new patient
Fill Patient Two into the name field
Fill a valid age into the age field
Fill Parkinsonism into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Verify the app is now in an active session for the newly registered patient

title: Show validation errors when required registration fields are missing
description: This test verifies registration cannot be submitted with missing required fields and field-level validation errors are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a valid age into the age field
Fill Spinal cord injury into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Verify a field-level validation error is displayed for the missing required name field

title: Prevent registration with invalid age input
description: This test verifies the registration form blocks clearly invalid age input and prompts the user to correct it.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Patient Age into the name field
Fill abc into the age field
Fill Guillain-Barré syndrome into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Verify an age validation error is displayed and the session is not created

title: Prevent submission of empty phrase to speech synthesis
description: This test verifies that attempting to synthesize speech with no selected phrase does not start playback and the UI indicates the action is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page
Complete patient registration with a valid name, age, and condition
Attempt to start speech output without selecting a phrase
Verify a validation cue is shown and no audio playback starts

title: Register with long condition text without breaking the flow
description: This test verifies registration accepts a long but reasonable condition description and still creates a usable session.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Patient Long Condition into the name field
Fill a valid age into the age field
Fill a long multi-sentence condition description into the condition field
Submit the registration form
Verify the patient session is created successfully and the main patient app view is displayed
